title: Principal Frontend Developer at Lenovo India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Lenovo India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
